title: 產品攝影 — 乾淨白背景
prompt: [產品名稱], product photography, clean white background, soft studio lighting, professional commercial photo, centered composition, subtle shadow, 8K, high detail --ar 1:1 --v 7
notes: 適合商品白底主圖，建議搭配簡單品名替換。多跑幾次可以得到不同角度的展示效果。

title: 生活感產品 — 場景化
prompt: [產品名稱] placed on [場景描述], lifestyle photography, natural daylight, warm tones, editorial style, bokeh background, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, magazine quality --ar 4:5 --v 7
notes: 場景描述建議用英文，效果更好。可嘗試不同場景如辦公桌、戶外草地、大理石桌面等。

title: 食物攝影 — 俯拍角度
prompt: [食物名稱], overhead flat lay food photography, rustic wooden table, fresh ingredients scattered around, soft natural light from left, warm color grading, food magazine style, appetizing, high detail --ar 1:1 --v 7
notes: 適合餐廳菜單、美食電商平台。建議搭配真實食物名稱（英文效果更佳）。

title: 美妝保養品 — 質感特寫
prompt: [產品名稱], luxury beauty product photography, marble surface, water droplets, soft pink and gold tones, close-up macro shot, elegant lighting, high-end commercial, glossy texture, 8K --ar 4:5 --v 7 --style raw
notes: --style raw 可讓畫面更真實，適合高端品牌。可嘗試替換不同的桌面材質（木紋、布料）。

title: 科技產品 — 暗色調
prompt: [科技產品名稱], dark moody product photography, dramatic rim lighting, black gradient background, subtle blue accent light, reflective surface, tech product commercial, cinematic, ultra detailed --ar 16:9 --v 7
notes: 適合電子產品、3C 配件。暗色調帶來科技感與高端質感，適合 Banner 橫幅設計。

title: 人像 — 企業形象照
prompt: Professional corporate headshot of [人物描述], wearing [服裝], confident smile, clean neutral background, soft key light with fill light, 50mm portrait lens, sharp focus on eyes, LinkedIn style, professional photography --ar 3:4 --v 7
notes: 建議用英文描述人物特徵。適合企業官網、個人品牌頁面。多試幾次直到表情自然為止。

title: 空間 — 室內設計展示
prompt: [空間風格] interior design, [房間類型], architectural photography, natural daylight streaming in, high ceiling, warm wood accents, plants, editorial interior magazine style, wide angle lens, 4K --ar 16:9 --v 7
notes: 風格可選：Scandinavian、Japandi、Industrial、Modern、Wabi-sabi。適合房仲、設計公司官網。

title: 活動 — 品牌氛圍照
prompt: [活動場景描述], event photography, candid moments, warm ambient lighting, bokeh string lights in background, golden hour, lifestyle brand aesthetic, authentic and natural feeling, 35mm lens --ar 3:2 --v 7

variables.example: outdoor brand pop-up market with happy customers

notes: 金色光線氛圍適合品牌暖色調。可加入人物互動描述讓畫面更生動自然。

title: 科技概念插畫
prompt: Flat design illustration of [主題], modern minimalist style, geometric shapes, limited color palette of [2-3色], clean lines, no outlines, white background, vector art aesthetic, suitable for tech startup website --ar 16:9 --v 7
notes: 限定色彩數量是關鍵，讓畫面更統一乾淨。Recraft 對向量風格支援特別好，可直接匯出 SVG。

title: 人物角色插畫
prompt: Cute flat illustration of a [人物描述] [doing 動作], simple shapes, pastel colors, friendly and approachable, Notion style illustration, soft rounded corners, minimal detail, cheerful mood --ar 1:1 --v 7

variables.example: working on a laptop with a coffee mug

notes: Notion style 可換成 Dribbble style 或 Mailchimp style 試試不同插畫風格。

title: 等距 Isometric 插畫
prompt: Isometric illustration of [場景描述], clean 3D isometric view, flat shading, vibrant but harmonious colors, detailed miniature scene, digital art, suitable for infographic, white background --ar 1:1 --v 7

variables.example: a cozy home office with plants, books and computer

notes: 等距視角非常適合 App 截圖說明、功能介紹頁。場景越具體，生成效果越好。

title: 品牌吉祥物設計
prompt: Flat vector mascot character of [角色描述], brand mascot design, simple geometric shapes, bold outlines, friendly expression, [品牌色] color palette, clean and memorable, white background, logo-ready design --ar 1:1 --v 7

variables.example: a small fox holding a paintbrush

notes: 多跑幾次選最滿意的版本，也可加入 front view, side view 要求不同角度。

title: Clay 黏土風 3D
prompt: 3D clay render of [物件描述], soft matte material, rounded edges, pastel [顏色] color, studio lighting, clean background, playful and cute, Pixar style, high quality render, octane render --ar 1:1 --v 7

variables.example: smartphone with app icons floating around it

notes: Clay render 近年非常流行，適合科技品牌軟化品牌形象。顏色建議選用品牌主色。

title: 玻璃質感 Glassmorphism
prompt: 3D glass [物件描述], transparent glossy material, frosted glass effect, iridescent reflections, colorful gradient background, floating in space, depth of field, studio lighting, futuristic aesthetic --ar 1:1 --v 7
notes: 搭配漸層背景效果最佳。可用於 Fintech、Web3、科技新創品牌的視覺設計。

title: 金屬質感產品 3D
prompt: Photorealistic 3D render of [產品描述], brushed [金屬材質] metal material, sharp reflections, dark studio background, dramatic product lighting, floating composition, high-end commercial render, 8K --ar 4:5 --v 7
notes: 金屬材質可選：gold、silver、copper、chrome。適合珠寶、高端配件、精品品牌。

title: 吉卜力風景
prompt: [場景描述], Studio Ghibli style, hand-painted watercolor texture, lush green nature, puffy clouds, warm afternoon light, peaceful and nostalgic atmosphere, anime landscape, high detail, 4K --ar 16:9 --v 7 --style raw

variables.example: a small village by the sea with flower fields

notes: --style raw 對吉卜力風格效果更自然。場景描述越有詩意，效果越好。適合桌布、社群貼文。

title: 新海誠風光影
prompt: [場景描述], Makoto Shinkai style, dramatic lighting, lens flare, ultra detailed clouds, vibrant sky gradient, cinematic composition, anime digital painting, atmospheric, breathtaking, 8K --ar 16:9 --v 7

variables.example: a train station platform at golden hour with warm light

notes: 光影描述越具體越好，如 golden hour、blue hour、after rain 都能帶來不同氛圍。

title: 賽璐璐動漫角色
prompt: [角色描述], anime illustration, cel shading style, clean line art, vibrant colors, expressive eyes, [髮色] hair, dynamic pose, manga aesthetic, professional anime artwork --ar 3:4 --v 7 --style raw
notes: 賽璐璐風格對動漫角色還原度很高。建議在 niji 模式下嘗試（--niji 6）。

title: 70 年代復古海報
prompt: [主題描述], 1970s retro poster design, groovy typography, warm orange and brown palette, sun-faded colors, vintage paper texture, psychedelic elements, screen print aesthetic --ar 3:4 --v 7

variables.example: summer music festival in the mountains

notes: 可加入 band name、event name 等文字描述，但 AI 生成的文字可能仍需後製處理。

title: 35mm 膠片風
prompt: [場景描述], shot on Kodak Portra 400 film, 35mm photography, analog grain, soft warm tones, slightly overexposed, candid moment, natural light, nostalgic feeling, raw and authentic --ar 3:2 --v 7 --style raw

variables.example: young woman reading in a sunlit cafe

notes: 可替換底片品牌：Fuji Superia、Lomography、Agfa Vista。每款底片有獨特色調。

title: 復古雜誌廣告風
prompt: [產品或主題描述], 1950s vintage magazine advertisement style, classic illustration, muted tones with pop color accents, retro typography layout, decorative borders, mid-century commercial art, nostalgic --ar 3:4 --v 7

variables.example: vintage cola bottle with happy family

notes: 年代可調整：1920s Art Deco、1940s wartime、1960s mod style。適合懷舊品牌行銷。

title: 北歐風靜物
prompt: [物件描述], Scandinavian minimalist style, muted earth tones, clean composition, lots of negative space, natural materials, soft diffused daylight, hygge atmosphere, editorial photography --ar 4:5 --v 7 --style raw

variables.example: ceramic coffee mug, linen cloth, dried flowers and a book

notes: Hygge 是北歐「舒適感」哲學。自然材質、木頭、陶器、亞麻布都是關鍵元素。

title: 日式侘寂風
prompt: [場景或物件描述], wabi-sabi aesthetic, imperfect beauty, aged textures, weathered surfaces, soft neutral tones, asymmetric composition, zen minimalism, Japanese aesthetic, film photography style --ar 4:5 --v 7 --style raw

variables.example: old clay teapot on mossy stone with fallen leaves

notes: 侘寂美學強調不完美、不恆久、不完整。適合有機、手作、天然品牌視覺。

title: 社群 Quote 背景
prompt: Abstract gradient background, smooth flowing shapes in [品牌色1] and [品牌色2], soft blur, dreamy atmosphere, suitable as text overlay background, modern and clean, Instagram post style --ar 1:1 --v 7
notes: 生成後在 Canva 上疊加文字即可。可加入 bokeh、light flare 等元素增加層次感。

title: 限動互動模板背景
prompt: Vertical Instagram story background, playful [風格] pattern, [品牌色] accent colors, large empty space in center for text overlay, fun and engaging, modern design, subtle texture --ar 9:16 --v 7
notes: 中間留白是讓使用者加入文字問答或互動元素的空間。適合品牌小測驗、調查限動。

title: 飲品特寫 — 咖啡拉花
prompt: [飲品名稱], close-up beverage photography, beautiful latte art on top, steam rising gently, dark moody cafe background, warm golden rim light, bokeh ambiance, 85mm macro lens, high detail, magazine quality --ar 4:5 --v 7 --style raw
notes: 適合咖啡廳、手搖飲、餐廳社群經營。可將飲品名稱換成任何飲料，效果都很好。

title: 數位 UI 介面插畫
prompt: Flat illustration of a [裝置類型] showing [App介面描述], modern UI design mockup, clean flat style, soft gradient background in [主色調], floating device, subtle shadow, professional app showcase, white background --ar 16:9 --v 7

variables.example: a fitness tracking dashboard with charts

notes: 適合 SaaS 產品官網、App Store 截圖說明。Recraft 可直接產生可編輯向量版本。

title: 夢幻泡泡 3D 場景
prompt: 3D render of [場景或物件], surrounded by floating iridescent soap bubbles, soft pastel dreamy atmosphere, volumetric light rays, bokeh background in [背景色], photorealistic render, magical and whimsical mood --ar 1:1 --v 7

variables.example: a tiny house on a mossy rock

notes: 夢幻泡泡場景非常適合美妝、保養、兒童品牌的社群視覺。多跑幾次挑選泡泡分布最好的版本。

title: 品牌封面 Banner
prompt: Wide banner design background, [風格描述] aesthetic, [品牌色1] to [品牌色2] gradient flow, abstract organic shapes, professional and modern, empty center space for logo and text, horizontal composition, high resolution --ar 16:9 --v 7
notes: 適合 Facebook 封面、YouTube 頻道橫幅、官網 Hero 背景。生成後在 Canva 疊加文字效果最佳。

title: 極簡幾何海報
prompt: Minimalist geometric poster design, [形狀元素] composition, muted [色調] color palette, lots of white space, elegant Swiss style typography layout, clean grid-based design, modern art print aesthetic --ar 2:3 --v 7
notes: 瑞士風格設計（Swiss Style）以格線與留白著稱。適合展覽、講座、品牌活動海報，文字需後製加入。
